title: Protocol Conform
description: Ensure a type provides required properties and methods by conforming to a specific protocol.
problemStatement:
Contractual coding! Define a protocol `Identifiable` that requires a variable `id: String`. Implement this protocol in a struct named `User`.

**Requirement:** The `id` property in the protocol should be `{ get }`.
hints: Protocols define a blueprint of methods or properties that a type MUST implement.
expectedOutput: A User struct with an id property
